zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱调整
zh.content:
当前/美元走势呈现震荡回调格局，价格551.7跌破20日均线559附近，短期多头动能减弱，高点不断下移。

MACD指标为-2.31，释放明显空头信号，市场动能偏弱，虽然缺乏RSI数据，但从价格结构看卖压占优，反弹延续性不足。

下方支撑关注550及545区间，一旦失守可能触发加速回落；上方阻力集中在558至565区域，均线559构成短线压力带。

操作建议以区间思路为主，未有效突破565之前不宜追多，跌破545可顺势偏空，等待趋势重新选择方向后再跟随。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD, referencing , is currently in a short-term corrective phase after failing to sustain momentum above recent highs. Price action near 551.7 shows consolidation just above the intraday low, suggesting weakening bullish pressure. With price trading below the 20-day SMA at 559.03, the broader short-term trend has shifted neutral-to-bearish unless recovery occurs soon. Market structure reflects hesitation after rejection from higher levels.

MACD is negative at -2.31, indicating bearish momentum is still active, while the absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold clarity. However, price behavior near the lower range implies sellers are gradually gaining control. The lack of a bullish MACD signal line crossover suggests momentum has not yet reversed. Without renewed buying volume, downside pressure may persist and keep rallies limited and short-lived.

Immediate support lies at 550, a key psychological level, followed by 545 and 535 as deeper retracement zones. Resistance is clustered around the 20-day SMA at 559, then 565, and stronger supply near 575 where prior rejection occurred. Price compression between 550 and 559 suggests an imminent directional move, with breakout confirmation needed from either boundary.

Trading approach favors caution: short-term traders may consider longs only on a confirmed reclaim above 559 with sustained momentum, targeting 565–575. Alternatively, a breakdown below 550 could trigger continuation selling toward 545. Risk management is essential due to tight range volatility, and neutral positioning remains appropriate until clearer directional confirmation emerges.
